title: 10 best herbal creams for glowing skin

remedy_properties: Curcumin: Turmeric's active compound, curcumin, has potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the skin, resulting in a smoother and more even-toned complexion.

Antimicrobial properties: Herbal turmeric creams contain antimicrobial compounds that help to combat acne-causing bacteria, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection, leading to clearer and healthier-looking skin.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory properties of turmeric help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness, irritation, and hyperpigmentation, leaving the skin looking brighter and more radiant.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Curcuma longa, also known as turmeric, creams helps with glowing skin because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The active compound curcumin, present in turmeric, neutralizes free radicals and reduces oxidative stress, which can cause skin damage and dullness. By promoting collagen production and improving skin elasticity, turmeric creams help to even out skin tone, reduce fine lines, and give skin a radiant and youthful appearance, resulting in a healthy and glowing complexion. Regular use can also improve skin firmness and reduce the appearance of blemishes.
remedy_constituents: Curcumin: This polyphenol compound helps to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, promoting a healthy and even skin tone, and giving the skin a radiant glow.

Tumerone: A sesquiterpene present in Curcuma longa, Tumerone has potent antioxidant properties that protect the skin from environmental damage, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and leaving the skin looking smoother and more even-toned.

Demethoxycurcumin (DMC): This curcuminoid has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to reduce the appearance of acne, hyperpigmentation, and other skin imperfections, giving the skin a clearer and more glowing appearance.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are commonly used in skincare products due to their high content of curcumin, a natural anti-inflammatory compound that helps to reduce skin inflammation and promote a healthy glow.
Leaves: Leaves are used in skincare products for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to protect the skin from environmental stressors and promote a radiant complexion.
Roots: Roots are often used in skincare products for their natural antibacterial and antifungal properties, which help to prevent skin infections and promote a clear, glowing complexion.
remedy_recipe: Extract 500g of fresh curcuma longa rhizomes and chop them into small pieces for future use.
Steam the chopped rhizomes in 2 liters of water for 30 minutes to release active compounds.
Mix 200ml of distilled water with 100g of beeswax and 20g of emulsifying wax in a double boiler.
Add 50g of the steamed curcuma longa extract and 50g of glycerin to the double boiler mixture.
Stir the mixture thoroughly and pour it into a container to cool and thicken within 30 minutes.

remedy_properties: Antioxidants: Herbal teas like green tea, chamomile, and hibiscus contain high levels of antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals in the skin, reducing oxidative stress and promoting a radiant complexion.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: Herbs like calendula, peppermint, and lavender contain anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation to reveal smoother, brighter-looking skin.

Soothing and calming properties: Herbal teas like chamomile, valerian root, and passionflower have a calming effect on the skin, which can help to reduce stress-induced breakouts, ease irritation, and promote relaxation, leading to a more even-toned complexion.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Camellia sinensis, also known as tea, creams helps with glowing skin because of its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The high content of theaflavins and thearubigins in these creams helps to protect the skin from environmental stressors and promote collagen production, resulting in a smoother and more even-toned complexion. The cream's ability to penetrate deep into the skin also helps to nourish and hydrate the skin, leaving it looking radiant and healthy, giving the skin a natural glow.
remedy_constituents: Catechins: These polyphenolic compounds help protect the skin from environmental stressors and oxidative damage, promoting a healthy and radiant complexion.

Gallic acid: As a potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, gallic acid helps reduce skin inflammation, prevent collagen breakdown, and maintain skin elasticity for a smoother and brighter appearance.

Epigallocatechin gallate (EGCG): This catechin is particularly effective in inhibiting matrix metalloproteinases (MMPs), which break down collagen and elastin, leading to wrinkles and fine lines, thereby preserving skin firmness and glow.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Known for their high content of antioxidants and fatty acids, which help to nourish and protect the skin.
Seeds: Rich in essential fatty acids and vitamins, they promote skin elasticity and hydration, giving a healthy glow.
Buds: Contain high levels of antioxidants and flavonoids, which help to protect the skin from damage and promote a radiant complexion.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 cup of dried camellia sinensis leaves to use in the herbal cream recipe.
Steep 1 tablespoon of dried leaves in 1 cup of boiling water for 5 minutes to create a strong infusion.
Strain the infusion and combine it with 1/2 cup of distilled water and 1 tablespoon of emulsifying wax.
Add 1 tablespoon of shea butter and 1 teaspoon of vitamin e oil to the mixture and heat it gently.
Whip the mixture until it thickens and then pour it into a clean container for storage.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Many herbal extracts, such as green tea, chamomile, and turmeric, contain antioxidants that help protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, leading to a more even-toned and radiant complexion.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbs like aloe vera, lavender, and ginger have anti-inflammatory compounds that can soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and promoting healthy skin circulation, which can result in a smoother, brighter appearance.

Hydrating properties: Certain herbs, such as aloe vera, chamomile, and calendula, contain moisturizing compounds that help lock in moisture and provide long-lasting hydration to the skin, leaving it feeling soft, supple, and healthy-looking.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba, also known as maidenhair tree, creams helps with glowing skin because of its powerful antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The extract is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which work together to nourish and protect the skin. It helps to improve blood flow, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and promotes collagen production, giving the skin a smoother, more even tone. Additionally, Ginkgo biloba creams help to reduce puffiness and dark circles, leaving the skin looking brighter and more radiant.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These plant-based compounds help protect the skin from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, resulting in a smoother and more radiant complexion.
Bilobalide: This triterpene derivative has anti-inflammatory properties, which can reduce redness and irritation in the skin, promoting a clearer and more even-toned glow.

Quercetin: As a powerful antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, quercetin helps to protect the skin from environmental stressors, reduce puffiness, and enhance skin elasticity, contributing to a healthier and more glowing appearance.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Ginkgo biloba leaves are commonly used due to their high content of flavonoids and terpenoids, which help to improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation, resulting in healthier and glowing skin.
Seeds: Ginkgo biloba seeds are used for their antioxidant properties, which help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a radiant and even-toned complexion.

Buds: Ginkgo biloba buds are utilized for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and revealing a smoother, glowing complexion.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 250 grams of ginkgo biloba leaves from mature trees that are at least 20 years old.
Dry the harvested ginkgo biloba leaves in a temperature-controlled environment at 50 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Combine 100 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves with 200 grams of base cream in a double boiler.
Stir the mixture continuously for 30 minutes to infuse the base cream with the herbal extract.
Strain the mixture and bottle the resulting herbal ginkgo biloba cream in a sterile environment.

remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound helps to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing inflammation and redness, which can lead to a more even-toned and radiant complexion.

Flavonoids: These plant-based compounds have antioxidant properties, which help to protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthier and more luminous skin.

Saponins: Saponins in licorice cream can help to regulate sebum production, reducing acne and blackheads while also improving skin elasticity and firmness, resulting in a smoother and brighter complexion.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra, also known as licorice, creams helps with glowing skin because of its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The active compound, glycyrrhizin, helps to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation. It also contains licoricidin, which has been shown to improve skin elasticity and firmness, giving the skin a radiant and youthful appearance. Additionally, licorice root cream has been found to reduce hyperpigmentation, resulting in a more even-toned and glowing complexion. This makes it an excellent addition to any skincare routine.
remedy_constituents: Licorice Saponins: These saponins help with glowing skin by reducing inflammation and improving skin elasticity, resulting in a smoother and more radiant complexion.

Glycyrrhetic Acid: This acid helps with glowing skin by providing antioxidant properties that neutralize free radicals and protect the skin from environmental stressors, leading to a more even-toned and glowing complexion.

Vitamins and Minerals (including Vitamin E and Zinc): These vitamins and minerals help with glowing skin by promoting collagen production, reducing oxidative stress, and regulating skin cell turnover, resulting in a brighter and more youthful appearance.
remedy_parts: Roots: Used in creams due to their high content of glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritations.
Flowers: Employed in skincare products to harness their antioxidant properties, which help to neutralize free radicals and promote healthy, radiant skin.
Leaves: Utilized in creams for their emollient and moisturizing properties, which help to lock in moisture and provide a smooth, glowing complexion.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 20 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots to use in the herbal cream recipe.
Combine the weighed roots with 200 milliliters of distilled water in a saucepan over medium heat.
Simmer the mixture for 30 minutes then strain it through a cheesecloth to remove the solids.
Mix 100 milliliters of the obtained liquid with 100 milliliters of a carrier oil such as jojoba oil in a bowl.
Whip the resulting mixture with a hand mixer until it thickens to form a smooth cream texture.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects: Sweet Briar's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties help to protect the skin from environmental stressors, reduce inflammation, and promote healthy collagen production, resulting in a more radiant complexion.

Wound healing and tissue regeneration: The plant's ability to stimulate wound healing and tissue regeneration can help to improve skin elasticity, reduce fine lines and wrinkles, and leave skin looking smoother and more even-toned.

Antibacterial and antifungal properties: Sweet Briar's antibacterial and antifungal properties can help to combat acne-causing bacteria and fungal infections that can lead to dull, congested skin, allowing for a brighter, clearer complexion.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosa rubiginosa, also known as sweet briar, creams helps with glowing skin because of its rich antioxidant properties. The cream contains high levels of vitamin C and flavonoids, which help to protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals. This leads to improved skin elasticity, reduced fine lines and wrinkles, and a brighter, more even complexion. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of Rosa rubiginosa help to soothe and calm the skin, promoting a healthy and radiant glow. Regular use can leave skin looking refreshed and revitalized.
remedy_constituents: Triterpenoids: These compounds help to reduce inflammation and promote skin cell regeneration, leading to a smoother and brighter complexion.

Rosmarinic acid (phenolic compound): This antioxidant helps to neutralize free radicals and protect the skin from damage caused by UV radiation and environmental stressors, resulting in a more even-toned and radiant appearance.
Sphingosine (phospholipid): This lipid helps to maintain the skin's natural barrier function, retain moisture, and improve skin elasticity, giving the skin a healthy and glowing appearance.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They are used to create creams due to their rich content of antioxidants and essential oils that help to protect and nourish the skin.
Leaves: Leaves are used to make creams because they contain salicylic acid and other compounds that help to exfoliate and brighten the skin.
Seeds: Seeds are used to make creams due to their high content of essential fatty acids and antioxidants that help to moisturize and protect the skin.
remedy_recipe: Gather 20g of rosa rubiginosa petals, dried for 2 weeks in a well-ventilated area.
Combine 100g of sweet almond oil with 20g of rosa rubiginosa petals in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture under low heat for 2 hours, then strain it through a cheesecloth.
Add 50g of beeswax and 20g of cocoa butter to the mixture and melt it in the double boiler.
Whip the mixture until it thickens and becomes a smooth, creamy texture, ready for use within 30 minutes.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Pot marigold's antioxidant compounds, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, help protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, leading to a more radiant and even-toned complexion.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: The herbal extract's anti-inflammatory properties can reduce redness, irritation, and acne, allowing the skin to look smoother and brighter, while also reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

Wound-Healing Properties: Pot marigold has been traditionally used to promote wound healing by accelerating tissue repair and reducing inflammation, which can lead to a more even skin tone and reduced scarring.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Calendula officinalis, also known as pot marigold, creams helps with glowing skin because of its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The cream's high concentration of triterpenoid saponins and carotenoids helps to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation. As a result, the skin's natural barrier is restored, allowing it to better retain moisture and appear smoother and more radiant. Regular use can lead to a more even-toned complexion and an overall glow, giving the skin a healthy and vibrant appearance.
remedy_constituents: Triterpenoids: These compounds help protect the skin from damage, reduce inflammation, and promote collagen production, resulting in a smoother and more radiant complexion.

Nordihydroguaiaretic acid (NDGA): A phenolic compound, NDGA has potent antioxidant properties that neutralize free radicals, reduce oxidative stress, and prevent skin aging, leading to a healthier and more glowing appearance.

Calendulin: A triterpene glycoside, calendulin exhibits anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which help soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation, and promoting a clear and even-toned complexion.
remedy_parts: Flowers: The flowers are the most commonly used part of Calendula officinalis in skincare products due to their high concentration of anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds.
Leaves: The leaves of Calendula officinalis are also used in skincare products, as they contain similar properties to the flowers and can help soothe and protect the skin.

Seeds: The seeds of Calendula officinalis are sometimes used in skincare products, although less frequently than the flowers or leaves, as they contain smaller amounts of anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 fresh calendula officinalis flowers on a sunny day when they are fully open and dry the petals.
Infuse 100g of dried calendula petals in 500ml of carrier oil such as jojoba or sweet almond oil.
Combine 50g of beeswax with 50g of cocoa butter in a double boiler and heat until melted.
Mix the infused oil with 20g of vitamin e oil and the melted beeswax mixture in a heat-resistant bowl.
Pour the mixture into small containers and let it cool and set at room temperature for 30 minutes.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lavender's antioxidant compounds help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can lead to premature aging and dullness, resulting in a brighter and more radiant complexion.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Lavender's anti-inflammatory agents reduce redness and inflammation, soothing irritated skin and promoting healthy blood flow, which helps to even out skin tone and give it a smoother appearance.

Soothing and calming properties: Lavender's calming effects help to relax the skin and mind, reducing stress and anxiety, which can contribute to acne, fine lines, and other skin issues that detract from a glowing complexion.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lavandula angustifolia, also known as English lavender, creams helps with glowing skin because of its potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The active compounds in lavender, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, work to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation. As a result, skin appears smoother, brighter, and more even-toned. Additionally, lavender's antiseptic properties help to balance the skin's natural pH, promoting a healthy and radiant complexion. This contributes to a glowing and refreshed appearance.
remedy_constituents: Linalool: A terpene that helps to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and improve skin elasticity, resulting in a healthier and more radiant complexion.
Linalyl acetate: A terpene that has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, helping to protect the skin from damage, reduce fine lines and wrinkles, and maintain a smooth, even tone.

Lavandulol: A terpene that has antibacterial and antifungal properties, helping to control acne-causing bacteria, reduce skin irritation, and promote a balanced skin microbiome, leading to a clearer and more glowing complexion.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Lavandula angustifolia flowers are used to make creams for glowing skin due to their high content of antioxidants and essential oils that help soothe and calm skin.
Leaves: Lavandula angustifolia leaves are used to make creams for glowing skin because they contain compounds that help reduce inflammation and promote skin regeneration.
Seeds: Lavandula angustifolia seeds are used to make creams for glowing skin due to their rich oil content, which is believed to have anti-inflammatory and moisturizing properties.
remedy_recipe: Weigh out 20 grams of dried lavandula angustifolia flowers and set aside for infusion.
Combine 200 milliliters of distilled water with the dried flowers in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at 100 degrees celsius for 20 minutes to facilitate the extraction process.
Strain the liquid through cheesecloth into a clean container and discard the solids immediately.
Add 100 grams of a base ingredient such as shea butter or coconut oil to the liquid mixture.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Chamomile cream's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and damage to the skin, leading to a brighter and more even-toned complexion.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Chamomile cream's anti-inflammatory properties reduce redness and swelling caused by skin irritations or acne, promoting a clearer and smoother appearance.

Soothing and calming effects: Chamomile cream's calming effects help to relax the skin, reducing stress and tension that can lead to dullness and premature aging, while also providing a sense of calm and comfort to sensitive skin.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Matricaria chamomilla, also known as chamomile, creams helps with glowing skin because of its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The cream soothes and calms the skin, reducing redness and irritation, and promoting a smooth and even tone. It also helps to lock in moisture, leaving the skin feeling soft and supple. Additionally, chamomile's anti-aging properties help to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, giving the skin a radiant and youthful glow. This results in a more even-toned and healthy-looking complexion.
remedy_constituents: Apigenin: This flavonoid acts as an antioxidant, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress that can cause skin damage and dullness, promoting a healthy and radiant complexion.
Bisabolol: As a sesquiterpene alcohol, bisabolol soothes and calms the skin, reducing redness and irritation, allowing for better skin hydration and a more even skin tone.

Luteolin: A flavonoid with potent antioxidant properties, luteolin helps protect the skin from environmental stressors, reduces inflammation, and promotes collagen production, resulting in a smoother and brighter appearance.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Their high content of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds helps soothe and calm the skin.
Leaves: They contain flavonoids and other beneficial compounds that promote skin regeneration and improve skin texture.
Seeds: The seeds of Matricaria chamomilla contain essential fatty acids and other nutrients that nourish and moisturize the skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1/2 cup of matricaria chamomilla flowers at dawn when they are in full bloom.
Dry the flowers in a low-temperature oven at 150°f for 2 hours or until brittle.
Infuse 2 tablespoons of dried flowers in 2 cups of jojoba oil for 2 weeks in a cool dark place.
Strain the oil mixture through a cheesecloth and discard the solids after 2 weeks.
Mix 2 tablespoons of the infused oil with 2 tablespoons of beeswax and 2 tablespoons of coconut oil in a double boiler.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Sage cream's antioxidant properties help protect the skin from environmental stressors, such as pollution and UV damage, which can lead to dull and uneven skin tone, allowing for a brighter and more radiant complexion.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in sage cream help reduce redness, swelling, and irritation, which can cause pores to appear larger and skin to look dull, resulting in smoother and more even-toned skin.

Antibacterial and Antifungal Properties: Sage cream's antibacterial and antifungal properties help control acne-causing bacteria and fungal infections that can clog pores and lead to breakouts, allowing for a clearer and more radiant complexion.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Salvia officinalis, also known as sage, creams helps with glowing skin because it is rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties. The antiseptic and antimicrobial properties of sage help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. The cream's ability to stimulate blood flow and improve skin elasticity also contributes to a radiant and healthy complexion. Additionally, sage's natural antiseptic properties help to balance the skin's pH, leading to a smoother and more even-toned skin.
remedy_constituents: Rosmarinic acid: A polyphenolic compound that helps protect the skin from oxidative stress and inflammation, promoting a healthy and radiant complexion.
Salvianolic acid B: An antioxidant that has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
Ursolic acid: A terpenoid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help protect the skin from environmental stressors and promote a more even and glowing complexion.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and essential oils, Salvia officinalis leaves are often used in creams for their ability to protect and nourish the skin.

Flowers: Containing a range of bioactive compounds, Salvia officinalis flowers are added to creams for their potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to promote glowing and healthy skin.
Stems: The stems of Salvia officinalis contain salvinolic acids, which may contribute to the anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of creams, helping to enhance skin health and appearance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh salvia officinalis leaves in the morning after the dew has evaporated and rinse them with clean water.
Steep 2 tablespoons of salvia officinalis leaves in 1 cup of boiling distilled water for 5 to 10 minutes.
Combine the strained liquid with 1/4 cup of distilled water and 2 tablespoons of beeswax in a saucepan.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool slightly before whipping the mixture with a hand mixer.
Pour the thickened mixture into a clean glass jar and let it cool to room temperature before storing it in the refrigerator.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Thyme's antioxidant properties help to neutralize free radicals, which can damage skin cells and cause premature aging, resulting in a more radiant and youthful complexion.

Anti-inflammatory action: Thyme's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as thymol and carvacrol, reduce redness and inflammation, making it an effective ingredient for soothing acne-prone skin and reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
Antimicrobial properties: Thyme's antimicrobial properties help to combat bacteria, viruses, and fungi that can cause skin infections and imperfections, promoting a clear and even-toned complexion.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thymus vulgaris, also known as thyme, creams helps with glowing skin because of its rich antioxidant properties. Thyme contains compounds like carvacrol and linalool, which work to neutralize free radicals and protect the skin from environmental stressors. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties also help to reduce redness and irritation, promoting a healthy and radiant complexion. By nourishing the skin and fighting against oxidative damage, Thymus vulgaris creams help to reveal a brighter, more even-toned glow. Regular use can lead to a smoother, more luminous appearance.
remedy_constituents: Thymol: A phenolic monoterpene, thymol has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and calm skin irritations, promoting a clear and radiant complexion.

Rosmarinic acid: A polyphenolic compound, rosmarinic acid has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, protecting the skin from oxidative stress and environmental damage, leading to a smoother and more even-toned appearance.
Caryophyllene: A sesquiterpene, caryophyllene has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce redness and inflammation, resulting in a more even-toned and glowing complexion.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Thymus vulgaris leaves are often used in creams for glowing skin due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.

Flowers: The flowers of Thymus vulgaris are used to create creams for glowing skin as they contain flavonoids and carotenoids, which help protect the skin from damage and promote a radiant complexion.
Leaves: Thymus vulgaris leaves are also used in creams for glowing skin due to their ability to improve skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 cup of fresh thymus vulgaris leaves and flowers from your garden or local supplier.
Steep the leaves and flowers in 2 cups of boiling water for 10-15 minutes to create a herbal infusion.
Strain the infusion through a cheesecloth or fine mesh into a clean container to remove solids.
Mix 1/2 cup of the herbal infusion with 1/4 cup of distilled water and 2 tablespoons of beeswax in a double boiler.
Whip the mixture with a hand mixer until it thickens and forms a smooth cream, about 5-10 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger creams helps with glowing skin because of its remarkable anti-inflammatory properties. The antioxidants present in ginger have the ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation caused by environmental stressors and pollution. Additionally, ginger's natural antiseptic qualities help to purify the skin, unclog pores, and eliminate impurities that can cause dullness and uneven tone. As a result, regular use of herbal ginger creams can leave your skin looking radiant, smooth, and supple with an unparalleled glow.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Herbal ginger creams contain antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, which can damage skin cells and cause premature aging, promoting a brighter and more even-toned complexion.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce redness and swelling caused by acne, rosacea, and other skin irritations, allowing for a smoother and more radiant appearance.

Vasoconstrictive Properties: The vasoconstrictive properties of ginger help to reduce blood flow to the skin's surface, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and giving the skin a more even tone and texture.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The underground stem of the ginger plant, rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which helps to soothe and calm the skin.
Roots: The primary source of bioactive compounds like gingerols and shogaols, responsible for reducing inflammation and promoting healthy skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ginger root and wash it thoroughly with cold water and soap.
Dry the ginger root in the shade or using a food dehydrator on low heat for 8 hours.
Grind 20g of dried ginger powder into a fine paste using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ginger paste with 50ml of coconut oil, 20g of beeswax, and 10 drops of lavender essential oil in a double boiler.
Stir the mixture until it reaches a smooth consistency and cools to room temperature then pour into glass jars for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ceylon cinnamon creams helps with glowing skin because of its unique combination of natural ingredients, including herbal extracts that work in harmony to nourish and rejuvenate the skin. The cinnamon content has potent anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce redness and irritation, while also stimulating blood flow to promote healthy skin cell growth. Additionally, the cream's moisturizing qualities hydrate the skin, leaving it feeling soft and supple, with a radiant glow that lasts all day.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Herbal Ceylon cinnamon creams contain antioxidants that help protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, resulting in a smoother, brighter complexion.
Anti-Inflammatory Properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in herbal Ceylon cinnamon creams help reduce redness, swelling, and irritation, promoting a more even-toned and calm appearance.

Antimicrobial Properties: Herbal Ceylon cinnamon creams possess antimicrobial properties that combat acne-causing bacteria and other skin infections, reducing the likelihood of breakouts and promoting healthy, glowing skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, the roots help to soothe and calm the skin, promoting a radiant glow.
Rhyzomes: With their natural antibacterial properties, rhyzomes are effective in reducing acne and other skin imperfections, leading to healthier-looking skin.
remedy_recipe: Collect high-quality cinnamomum verum essential oil in an amount of 10% of the total cream volume.
Combine 30 grams of coconut oil with 20 grams of beeswax and heat them at 60°c for 30 minutes.
Add 50 milliliters of distilled water to the mixture and stir it well to ensure even distribution.
Add 5 grams of vitamin e oil and 1 gram of cinnamomum verum powder to the mixture and blend until smooth.
Pour the mixture into sterilized containers and let it cool down at room temperature for 60 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kansas coneflower creams helps with glowing skin because of their unique blend of natural ingredients. The cream's active compounds, such as echinacea, work to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and irritation that can lead to dullness and imperfections. Additionally, the cream's antioxidant properties help protect the skin from environmental stressors, promoting a radiant and even-toned complexion. As a result, herbal Kansas coneflower creams leave the skin looking healthy, vibrant, and luminous.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Echinacea contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which can help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a more radiant and even-toned complexion.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The plant's alkaloids may help reduce inflammation in the skin, which can alleviate conditions like acne, rosacea, or eczema, leading to healthier-looking skin.

Wound-healing properties: Echinacea has been traditionally used to accelerate wound healing and reduce scarring. This property might translate to topical creams that promote skin regeneration and improve skin elasticity.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help soothe and calm the skin, reducing signs of aging.
Seeds: Containing omega-3 fatty acids and essential nutrients, these seeds nourish and regenerate the skin, leaving it looking radiant and healthy.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh echinacea angustifolia flowers and leaves in the early morning when dew still glistening on petals and foliage.
Combine 20 grams of dried echinacea angustifolia with 100 ml of carrier oil like coconut or sweet almond oil in a clean glass jar.
Steep the mixture for 4 hours under direct sunlight or moonlight to infuse herbs into the carrier oil.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another clean glass jar discarding solids and retaining clear liquid.
Blend 50 ml of the infused oil with 20 grams of beeswax and 10 drops of vitamin e oil in a double boiler until smooth and creamy texture achieved.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion creams helps with glowing skin because it is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that deeply nourish and moisturize the skin. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and promoting a radiant complexion. Additionally, dandelion extract has natural brightening agents that help to even out skin tone, leaving you with a healthy, glowing appearance that looks and feels amazing.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Dandelion cream's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as taraxasterol and taraxacin, help reduce redness and swelling in the skin, leaving it looking calm and even-toned.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in dandelion cream, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, neutralize free radicals that can cause damage to skin cells, resulting in a brighter, more radiant complexion.

Antibacterial and antifungal properties: Dandelion cream's antimicrobial compounds, such as sesquiterpenes, help combat acne-causing bacteria and fungi, reducing the appearance of pimples and other skin imperfections.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and vitamins, dandelion roots help soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting a healthy glow.
Leaves: Packed with chlorophyll, vitamins A, C, and K, and minerals like potassium and magnesium, dandelion leaves nourish and purify the skin, leaving it radiant and clear.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry 100g of fresh dandelion flowers and leaves under shade for 2-3 days or air-dry for a week.
Combine the dried plant material with 200ml of olive oil and heat in a double boiler at low temperature for 2 hours stirring occasionally.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth into a clean bowl discarding solids and transferring liquid to sterilized glass jars.
Add 20g of beeswax and 10g of coconut oil to the liquid mixture heating gently until fully incorporated and smooth consistency is achieved.
Pour the final mixture into sterilized glass tubes filling to the top and allowing it to cool completely before storing in a dark place for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint creams helps with glowing skin because of its exceptional ability to purify and rejuvenate the complexion. The cooling properties of peppermint oil help to reduce inflammation and soothe irritated skin, leaving it looking calm and radiant. Additionally, peppermint's natural antioxidants and astringent qualities help to remove impurities and excess oils, unclog pores, and balance the skin's natural pH, resulting in a healthy, glowing complexion that exudes vitality and radiance.
remedy_properties: Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Peppermint contains compounds like menthol and methyl salicylate, which reduce inflammation and redness, leaving skin looking calm and radiant.

Antioxidant Properties: The antioxidants present in peppermint, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and damage to skin cells, promoting a healthy and glowing complexion.
Cooling and Soothing Properties: Peppermint's cooling sensation helps to reduce puffiness, tighten pores, and soothe irritated skin, leaving it looking smooth and refreshed.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, peppermint roots help soothe and calm irritated skin, promoting a radiant glow.
Rhyzomes: Containing a high concentration of menthol and menthone, peppermint rhyzomes provide a cooling effect that helps to reduce puffiness and dark circles under the eyes.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 grams of fresh peppermint leaves and dry them in the shade for 2 weeks.
Grind the dried peppermint leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 100 grams of coconut oil with 50 grams of beeswax pellets and heat the mixture at 160°f for 30 minutes.
Add 20 grams of the peppermint powder to the warm oil-wax mixture and stir well for 5 minutes.
Pour the mixture into a stainless steel container and let it cool and solidify at room temperature within 2 hours.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sandalwood creams helps with glowing skin because of its unique combination of natural ingredients that nourish, soothe, and rejuvenate the skin. The cream's antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce acne and redness, leaving the skin looking calm and clear. The antioxidant-rich sandalwood oil also helps to protect the skin from environmental stressors, while its humectant properties lock in moisture, leaving the skin feeling soft, supple, and radiant. This results in a natural glow that lasts all day.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Sandalwood's antioxidant compounds, such as sesquiterpenes and fatty acids, help neutralize free radicals that can cause skin damage and oxidative stress, promoting a brighter, more even-toned complexion.

Anti-Inflammatory Effects: Sandalwood contains anti-inflammatory compounds like terpinen-4-ol, which help soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation that can lead to dull-looking skin.

Skin Regeneration Properties: Sandalwood's fatty acids, particularly alpha-hydroxy acid (AHA), stimulate collagen production and improve skin elasticity, helping to reduce fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots for a more radiant and youthful appearance.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the sandalwood plant have anti-inflammatory properties, making them an effective ingredient in creams to soothe and calm irritated skin.
Buds: Sandalwood buds are rich in antioxidants and contain compounds like santalol, which help to protect the skin from environmental stressors and promote healthy aging.
Barks: The barks of the sandalwood plant have natural astringent properties, making them useful for creams that help to tighten pores and reduce acne.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 100 grams of dried santalum album powder and mix it with 20 grams of beeswax in a double boiler.
Add 50 milliliters of sweet almond oil and 20 milliliters of coconut oil to the mixture and stir until melted.
Remove the double boiler from heat and add 10 drops of lavender essential oil for its calming properties.
Pour the mixture into sterilized glass jars and let it cool and set at room temperature for two hours.
After setting, label and store the cream in an airtight container in the refrigerator to maintain freshness and potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel creams helps with glowing skin because of its unique combination of antioxidants, anti-inflammatory properties, and natural moisturizing agents. The antioxidants in fennel cream help to combat free radicals that can cause premature aging, while the anti-inflammatory compounds soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation. Additionally, the natural oils in fennel cream provide intense hydration, leaving skin feeling soft, supple, and radiant with a healthy glow. Regular use of fennel creams can lead to a more even-toned complexion and a reduced appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Fennel's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce redness and irritation on the skin, promoting a more even and radiant complexion.
Antioxidant property: The antioxidants present in fennel creams neutralize free radicals, which can damage skin cells and cause premature aging, resulting in healthier-looking and glowing skin.
Moisturizing property: Fennel's fatty acid content helps to lock in moisture, soothing dryness and dehydration, leaving the skin feeling soft, supple, and nourished.
remedy_parts: Roots: Fennel roots have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help soothe and calm irritated skin, promoting a radiant glow.
Seeds: Fennel seeds are rich in omega-3 fatty acids and antioxidants, which nourish and moisturize the skin, leaving it looking healthy and luminous.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh foeniculum vulgare leaves in the morning after dew has dried.
Combine 50 grams of fresh leaves with 200 milliliters of olive oil in a glass jar.
Steep mixture for 4 weeks in a dark place, shaking daily for 5 minutes.
Strain and filter mixture through cheesecloth, retaining 100 milliliters of infused oil.
Mix 20 grams of beeswax with the remaining infused oil and heat at low temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Burdock creams helps with glowing skin because it deeply nourishes and moisturizes the skin, leaving it feeling soft and supple. The anti-inflammatory properties of burdock root also help to reduce redness and irritation, while its antioxidant content protects the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals. Additionally, burdock's natural antibacterial properties help to regulate sebum production, resulting in a balanced complexion that appears radiant and healthy.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Burdock cream's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce redness and puffiness, resulting in a more radiant and even-toned complexion.
Antioxidant: Burdock root is rich in antioxidants that protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy skin cell growth and a youthful glow.

Soil-depuration and Detoxification: Burdock cream helps to remove impurities and toxins from the skin, unclog pores, and balance the skin's natural pH, leading to improved texture and a healthier appearance.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, burdock roots help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting a radiant complexion.
Seeds: Burdock seeds contain a unique blend of essential fatty acids and vitamins that nourish and moisturize the skin, leaving it supple and glowing.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh arctium lappa roots and chop them into small pieces weighing approximately 100g.
Steam the chopped roots in distilled water at 60°c for 30 minutes to extract their bioactive compounds.
Combine the steamed root extract with 200g of cold-pressed coconut oil, 50g of beeswax, and 20g of vitamin e oil.
Mix the ingredients thoroughly until they form a smooth emulsion and heat them in a double boiler at 60°c for 15 minutes.
Pour the hot mixture into sterilized glass jars and let it cool to room temperature before storing it in an airtight container for up to 6 months.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for glowing skin are topical products infused with plant extracts that help to nourish and revitalize the skin, leaving it radiant and healthy. These creams contain a blend of herbs such as Glycyrrhiza glabra, Melaleuca alternifolia, Camellia sinensis, Vitis vinifera, Aloe barbadensis, Calendula officinalis, Aloe vera, Centella asiatica, Cinchona officinalis, and Silybum marianum, which work together to improve skin texture and tone. If left untreated, dull skin can lead to low self-esteem, decreased confidence, and a negative impact on daily life.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to glowing skin that are treated with herbal creams are various skin concerns such as acne, eczema, and psoriasis. Herbal creams containing ingredients like aloe vera, tea tree oil, and chamomile soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing inflammation and redness. They also help to even out skin tone, improve texture, and provide antioxidant protection against environmental stressors. These natural remedies promote healthy, radiant-looking skin without harsh chemicals or side effects.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal creams that help with glowing skin is a blend of Aloe Vera, Green Tea, and Turmeric. Aloe Vera soothes and hydrates the skin, while Green Tea reduces inflammation and protects against environmental stressors. Turmeric, rich in curcumin, has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that promote collagen production and even skin tone. When combined, these herbal creams create a powerful synergy that not only heals but also nourishes the skin, leaving it with a radiant and healthy glow. Regular use can lead to long-term skin benefits.

remedies.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra creams helps with glowing skin because they contain licorice extract, which is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties. These properties help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation. The cream's ability to regulate skin pH levels and provide hydration also helps to smooth out fine lines and wrinkles, giving the skin a more even and radiant appearance. Regular use can lead to a brighter, more youthful-looking complexion.
remedy_constituents: Licorice Saponins: These compounds help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting a healthy, radiant complexion.
Glycyrrhizin: This triterpenoid saponin has potent antioxidant properties, protecting the skin from damage caused by free radicals and promoting a smooth, glowing appearance.
Phenolic Acids: These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, helping to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and promoting a brighter, more even-toned complexion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Licorice root extract is commonly used in creams for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin.
Leaves: Glycyrrhizin extracted from licorice leaves has been found to have skin-lightening properties, which can help to even out skin tone and promote a glowing complexion.

Roots: The roots of Glycyrrhiza glabra contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that can help to reduce skin irritation and promote healthy skin cell growth, leading to a brighter and more even-toned complexion.
remedy_recipe: Extract 500 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots and 500 milliliters of carrier oil in a double boiler.
Steep the mixture for 2 hours and 30 minutes in low heat.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth into a clean container and discard the solids.
Add 10 milliliters of vitamin e oil and 20 grams of beeswax to the liquid mixture.
Whip the mixture with an electric mixer for 10 minutes until it thickens and becomes creamy.

remedies.remedy_desc: Melaleuca alternifolia creams helps with glowing skin because they contain tea tree oil, which has potent anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. These properties help to reduce acne and other skin irritations, allowing the skin to look smoother and more radiant. Additionally, tea tree oil's antioxidant properties help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a brighter and more even-toned complexion. Regular use of Melaleuca alternifolia creams can leave skin looking healthy, vibrant, and glowing.
remedy_constituents: Cineole (Eucalyptol): It helps to reduce inflammation and prevent oxidative stress, which can cause dullness and damage to the skin.
Terpinen-4-ol: It has potent antimicrobial properties that help to control acne-causing bacteria, reduce redness, and promote a healthy skin tone.
α-Terpineol: It has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and promoting a radiant complexion.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are rich in tea tree oil, which has antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties that help to soothe and calm the skin.
Stems: They are a source of Melaleuca alternifolia's essential oil, which is often used in skincare products to promote healthy and glowing skin.
Barks: They contain a high concentration of antioxidants, which help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and promote a healthy and radiant complexion.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30-40 grams of dried melaleuca alternifolia leaves and flowers from organic sources for medicinal use.
Infuse 20-30 grams of the dried herbs in 500ml of carrier oil such as sweet almond oil for 2 hours.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter to remove the herbal solids from the oil.
Mix 10-15 grams of beeswax with 50-70 grams of the infused oil in a double boiler for 10 minutes.
Whip the cooled mixture with 10-15 grams of vitamin e oil in a hand mixer until it reaches a smooth consistency.

remedies.remedy_desc: Camellia sinensis creams helps with glowing skin because they are rich in antioxidants and essential fatty acids. The cream's active ingredients, including camellia oil and green tea extracts, work to deeply nourish and moisturize the skin. This leaves the skin looking smooth, supple, and radiant. The anti-inflammatory properties of Camellia sinensis also help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Regular use can lead to a noticeable improvement in skin texture and tone, giving the skin a healthy and glowing appearance.
remedy_constituents: Catechins: Help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, resulting in a brighter and more even-toned complexion.
Quercetin: Act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and promoting a more radiant and glowing skin.
Theaflavins: Have been shown to improve skin elasticity and firmness, giving the skin a smoother and more even texture, and reducing the appearance of pores.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Camellia sinensis leaves are rich in antioxidants and essential fatty acids that help to nourish and protect the skin.
Seeds: Camellia sinensis seeds are a rich source of omega-3 fatty acids and antioxidants that help to moisturize and soothe the skin.
Flowers: Camellia sinensis flowers are used for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce the appearance of fine lines and promote a glowing complexion.
remedy_recipe: Infuse 2 tablespoons of camellia sinensis leaves in 4 cups of boiling water for 5-7 minutes.
Strain the liquid through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl.
Combine 1/2 cup of the infused liquid with 1/2 cup of distilled water and 1/4 cup of coconut oil.
Whip the mixture using a hand mixer or whisk until it thickens and emulsifies completely.
Transfer the herbal cream to a sterilized container and store in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.

remedies.remedy_desc: Vitis vinifera creams helps with glowing skin because of its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The extracts from the grape vine contain resveratrol, which has been shown to protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals. This leads to a smoother, brighter complexion and reduced appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Additionally, the cream's hydrating properties help lock in moisture, resulting in a radiant and healthy-looking glow that enhances the skin's natural beauty.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These plant compounds help protect the skin from oxidative damage, promoting a healthy and radiant complexion.
Anthocyanins: Rich in antioxidants, anthocyanins help reduce inflammation and protect the skin from environmental stressors, resulting in a glowing and even-toned complexion.
Phenolic acids: These compounds help regulate the skin's natural barrier function, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles and promoting a smooth, glowing texture.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Grapeseed extract - Rich in antioxidants, which help protect the skin from damage and promote a healthy glow.
Seeds: Grapeseed oil - High in essential fatty acids that nourish and moisturize the skin, leaving it feeling soft and radiant.
Fruits: Resveratrol - A powerful antioxidant that helps reduce inflammation, protects against environmental stressors, and promotes a bright, even complexion.
remedy_recipe: Extract 100g of dried vitis vinifera in 500ml of carrier oil using a double boiler for 2 hours.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth into a clean container to separate the solids from the liquid.
Mix 10% of the extracted liquid with 90% of distilled water and add 2% of glycerin to create a solution.
Combine the solution with a combination of cetearyl alcohol and cetyl palmitate in a 1:1 ratio to create an emulsion.
Whip the emulsion using a hand mixer for 5 minutes to achieve a smooth and even consistency.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe barbadensis creams helps with glowing skin because of its rich antioxidant and moisturizing properties. The cream contains vitamins A, C, and E, as well as beta-carotene, which work together to soothe and nourish the skin. It also has anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce redness and irritation, promoting a smooth and even skin tone. Regular use can leave skin looking supple, hydrated, and radiant, giving it a healthy and glowing appearance. This makes Aloe barbadensis creams a popular choice for achieving glowing skin naturally.
remedy_constituents: Aloin: Helps to remove dead skin cells and promote cell turnover, revealing brighter, smoother skin.
Vitamins A, C, and E: Act as antioxidants, neutralizing free radicals that cause oxidative stress and skin damage, resulting in a more radiant complexion.
Glucomannans: Moisturize and hydrate the skin, locking in moisture and reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, giving skin a healthy, glowing appearance.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Aloe vera leaf gel is used due to its high water content, vitamins, and minerals that help to hydrate and nourish the skin, giving it a glowing appearance.

Rhyzomes: Aloe vera rhyzome contains a high concentration of aloin, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of acne and other skin imperfections.

Seeds: Aloe vera seeds contain a high amount of fatty acids, vitamins, and minerals that help to moisturize and protect the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and giving it a radiant glow.
remedy_recipe: Extract 100g of aloe barbadensis gel from 1 mature leaf by cutting and scooping the thick gel layer.
Mix the aloe gel with 20g of beeswax and 10g of coconut oil in a double boiler for 5 minutes.
Heat the mixture over low heat until the beeswax and coconut oil are fully dissolved and melted.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool and thicken for 15-20 minutes.
Whip the cooled mixture until it becomes light and fluffy and has a smooth creamy texture.

remedies.remedy_desc: Calendula officinalis creams helps with glowing skin because of its exceptional anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant's active compounds, such as triterpenoids and carotenoids, work to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and promoting a healthy glow. Additionally, calendula's antibacterial properties help to control acne-causing bacteria, while its moisturizing properties hydrate and nourish the skin, leaving it looking smooth, even, and radiant. This results in a more vibrant and youthful complexion.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These plant compounds help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and inflammation, promoting a healthy and radiant complexion.
Carotenoids: These pigments help protect the skin from sun damage and promote collagen production, resulting in a smoother and more even-toned skin.
Saponins: These natural compounds help to gently exfoliate and cleanse the skin, removing dead skin cells and revealing a brighter and more glowing complexion.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help to soothe and protect the skin.
Leaves: They contain flavonoids and saponins that contribute to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, beneficial for healthy and glowing skin.
Seeds: They are a rich source of essential fatty acids, particularly linoleic acid, which helps to nourish and moisturize the skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried calendula officinalis flowers when they are in full bloom.
Steep the dried calendula flowers in 250ml of carrier oil such as coconut or sweet almond oil for 2 weeks.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean container.
Mix 50g of beeswax with 50g of shea butter and 100ml of the infused calendula oil in a double boiler.
Blend the mixture thoroughly until it reaches a smooth and creamy consistency.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe vera creams helps with glowing skin because of its rich composition of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. It contains vitamin E, which is a powerful antioxidant that helps to neutralize free radicals and protect the skin from environmental stressors. Aloe vera also contains aloe barbadensis, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help to soothe and calm irritated skin. This results in a smoother, more even-toned complexion and a radiant glow, giving the skin a healthy and youthful appearance. Regular use can leave skin looking refreshed and rejuvenated.
remedy_constituents: Vitamins A, C, and E: These vitamins help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, promote collagen production, and improve skin texture, resulting in a brighter and more radiant complexion.
Polysaccharides (Glucomannans): These complex carbohydrates help to lock in moisture, soothe and calm the skin, and reduce inflammation, leading to a more even-toned and glowing complexion.

Glycoproteins (Acemannans): These glycoproteins help to stimulate collagen production, improve skin elasticity, and promote cell turnover, resulting in a smoother, more radiant, and healthier-looking skin.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They contain a high concentration of gel, which is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants that help to nourish and hydrate the skin.
Seeds: They are rich in essential fatty acids, particularly linoleic acid, which helps to lock in moisture and reduce inflammation in the skin.
Stems: They are a source of aloin, a compound that helps to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 3-4 mature aloe vera leaves from the plant and cut them into small pieces for processing.
Extract the gel from the aloe pieces using a spoon or scoop and transfer it to a blender.
Add 2 tablespoons of coconut oil and 2 tablespoons of beeswax to the blender containing the aloe gel.
Blend the mixture for 2-3 minutes until it is smooth and then heat it in a double boiler for 10 minutes.
Remove the mixture from the double boiler and add a few drops of vitamin e oil before pouring it into containers.

remedies.remedy_desc: Centella asiatica creams helps with glowing skin because of its unique blend of active compounds, particularly asiatic acid and madecassic acid. These compounds have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. By improving skin elasticity and firmness, Centella asiatica creams also promote a radiant and even-toned complexion, giving the skin a healthy and youthful glow. Regular use can leave skin looking smoother and more vibrant.
remedy_constituents: Triterpenoids: These compounds help with glowing skin by protecting against oxidative stress and inflammation, thus preserving the skin's natural barrier function and promoting a healthy, radiant complexion.

Asiatic acid: This compound helps with glowing skin by enhancing collagen production, reducing fine lines and wrinkles, and improving skin elasticity, resulting in a smoother, more youthful appearance.

Madecassic acid: This compound helps with glowing skin by exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce skin damage, improve skin texture, and promote a more even skin tone.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They contain high amounts of antioxidants, such as asiatic acid and madecassic acid, which help to protect and nourish the skin.
Stems: The stems of Centella asiatica contain triterpenoid saponins that aid in skin elasticity and hydration, resulting in a smoother and more radiant complexion.
Rhyzomes: The rhizomes have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of acne and fine lines.
remedy_recipe: Extract 10 grams of centella asiatica leaves and 5 grams of roots in a 70% ethanol solution for 2 weeks at room temperature.
Strain the solution through a cheesecloth and discard the solids then filter the liquid again using a 0.2 micron filter.
Mix the filtered extract with 50 grams of distilled water and 20 grams of glycerin in a clean container.
Add 5 grams of beeswax and 2 grams of cetyl alcohol to the mixture and heat it gently until the ingredients dissolve.
Pour the mixture into a clean container and let it cool and thicken at room temperature for 2 hours.

remedies.remedy_desc: Cinchona officinalis creams helps with glowing skin because they contain quinine, a natural antioxidant that protects the skin from environmental stressors and damage. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties also soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation. Additionally, Cinchona officinalis creams are rich in tannins, which have astringent properties that help to tighten pores and even out skin tone, giving the skin a radiant and healthy appearance. Regular use can lead to a more luminous and youthful complexion.
remedy_constituents: Quinic acid: Helps to balance skin pH and reduce inflammation, leading to a smoother and brighter complexion.
Quinoline alkaloids: Possesses antioxidant properties that neutralize free radicals and protect the skin from environmental stressors, promoting a healthy and radiant glow.
Quercetin: Exerts anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, resulting in a more even-toned and glowing complexion.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and brighten the skin.
Barks: Utilized for their astringent and antiseptic properties, which help to tone and protect the skin from environmental stressors.
Roots: Employed for their anti-aging and skin-lightening properties, which help to reduce the appearance of fine lines and hyperpigmentation.
remedy_recipe: Extract 100 grams of dried cinchona officinalis leaves in a ratio of 1 part to 2 parts solvent.
Steep the mixture for 2 hours at a temperature of 60-70°c.
Strain the liquid to obtain 50 grams of tincture in 30 minutes.
Mix the tincture with 250 grams of beeswax and 100 grams of coconut oil in 10 minutes.
Heat the mixture at 60-70°c for 10 minutes to create a smooth and stable cream.

remedies.remedy_desc: Silybum marianum creams helps with glowing skin because they are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids that protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation. It also helps to regulate the skin's natural barrier function, locking in moisture and promoting a healthy, radiant complexion. By nourishing and protecting the skin, Silybum marianum creams leave skin looking smooth, even-toned, and luminous.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: They help protect the skin from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, promoting a healthy and glowing complexion.

Silymarin: It has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and protect the skin from environmental stressors, ultimately contributing to a radiant and glowing appearance.

Silybin: This constituent has been shown to have a positive effect on skin health by improving skin elasticity, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and providing antioxidant protection, all of which contribute to a glowing and youthful appearance.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties that help to soothe and protect the skin, promoting a glowing complexion.
Leaves: The leaves of Silybum marianum are used to make creams that help to reduce inflammation and prevent oxidative stress, resulting in healthy and radiant skin.
Flowers: Silybum marianum flowers are used to create creams that have anti-aging properties, helping to reduce fine lines and wrinkles, and giving the skin a smooth and glowing appearance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of fresh silybum marianum flowers and leaves on a sunny day in summer.
Dry the harvested silybum marianum in a low-temperature oven at 50c for 2 hours.
Grind 20g of dried silybum marianum into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 10g of the ground silybum marianum powder with 50g of beeswax and 50g of coconut oil in a double boiler.
Whip 100g of cooled silybum marianum mixture with a hand mixer for 5 minutes to create a smooth cream.
